home.introQuote: A hall of light, a garden under the stars. At Bellagio Event's, every celebration is gilded in gold and becomes an everlasting memory.
home.venuesIntro: Two exceptional settings, one promise of elegance.
home.packagesIntro: From venue-only to the all-inclusive Prestige.
home.ctaBannerText: Contact us for a guided visit.

about.title: About
about.intro: An estate built for the exceptional event.
about.story1: Bellagio Event's was born of one conviction: a great event deserves a great place. On our estate, contemporary architecture, light and nature combine to offer a setting worthy of life's most beautiful moments.
about.story2: Since opening, we have hosted weddings, galas, launches and private celebrations with the same demand: that every detail serves the emotion. Two spaces, one dedicated team, and an obsession with the bespoke.
about.value1Text: Production worthy of the biggest stages, in every detail.
about.value2Text: Your vision first. We orchestrate it, without compromise.
about.value3Text: A team that anticipates, so you can live the moment.

faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.intro: Everything you need to plan your event.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.intro: Book a visit or request a tailored quote.
